texto: I don't follow anything that's said about him much, but the Uwe Boll that I know is just a really cool guy. He's just a really quiet, kind and passionate filmmaker who really believes in what he's doing. Like any director that an actor wants to work with, you want a director who's passionate and believes in the work that he's doing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Michael Eklund: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I don't follow anything that's said about him much, but the Uwe Boll that I know is just a really…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, work, want pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e want.

frase_original: I don't follow anything that's said about him much, but the Uwe Boll that I know is just a really cool guy. He's just a really quiet, kind and passionate filmmaker who really believes in what he's doing. Like any director that an actor wants to work with, you want a director who's passionate and believes in the work that he's doing.
